title: Cloud Engineer
description: Design and implement cloud infrastructure solutions on AWS and Azure. Manage containerized workloads and CI/CD pipelines.

title: Cloud Infrastructure Engineer
description: Lead cloud migration projects and architect multi-cloud environments. Build automation frameworks for infrastructure provisioning.

title: Junior Cloud Engineer
description: Assist in managing cloud resources and deploying applications. Learn and implement cloud security best practices.

title: Cloud DevOps Engineer
description: Build and maintain CI/CD pipelines for cloud-native applications. Implement infrastructure as code and container orchestration.

title: Cloud Security Engineer
description: Implement cloud security controls and compliance frameworks. Monitor and respond to security incidents in cloud environments.

title: AWS Solutions Architect
description: Design scalable, fault-tolerant architectures on AWS. Lead technical discussions and provide cloud strategy guidance.

title: Cloud Platform Engineer
description: Build internal developer platforms on Kubernetes. Create self-service tools for engineering teams.

title: Multi-Cloud Engineer
description: Architect and manage workloads across AWS, Azure, and GCP. Optimize cloud costs and implement governance policies.

title: Cloud Automation Engineer
description: Develop automation scripts and tools for cloud infrastructure management. Reduce manual intervention through IaC.

title: Site Reliability Engineer (Cloud)
description: Ensure high availability and performance of cloud services. Design monitoring systems and automate incident response.

title: Cloud Network Engineer
description: Design and manage cloud networking infrastructure including VPCs, load balancers, and hybrid connectivity.

title: Cloud Data Engineer
description: Build data pipelines on cloud platforms using managed services. Implement data lakes and warehousing solutions.

title: Data Scientist
description: Build predictive models and derive insights from large datasets. Collaborate with engineering teams to deploy models.

title: Senior Data Scientist
description: Lead data science initiatives and mentor junior team members. Design experiments and build production ML systems.

title: Junior Data Analyst
description: Analyze datasets and create reports for business stakeholders. Build dashboards and support data-driven decisions.

title: ML Engineer
description: Build and deploy machine learning models at scale. Optimize model performance and maintain ML pipelines.

title: NLP Engineer
description: Develop NLP pipelines for text classification, entity extraction, and sentiment analysis. Fine-tune large language models.

title: Computer Vision Engineer
description: Build image and video processing pipelines. Develop and deploy computer vision models for real-time applications.

title: Data Science Manager
description: Manage a team of data scientists and align projects with business objectives. Drive data strategy and ML adoption.

title: Frontend Developer
description: Build responsive and accessible web applications using React. Implement pixel-perfect designs and optimize performance.

title: Senior Frontend Engineer
description: Architect frontend systems and establish best practices. Lead code reviews and mentor junior developers.

title: Junior Frontend Developer
description: Develop UI components and implement designs. Learn modern frontend frameworks and best practices.

title: React Native Developer
description: Build cross-platform mobile applications using React Native. Integrate with native modules and APIs.

title: UI/UX Developer
description: Bridge the gap between design and development. Create interactive prototypes and implement design systems.

title: Backend Developer
description: Design and implement RESTful APIs and microservices. Manage databases and ensure application performance.

title: Senior Backend Engineer
description: Architect scalable backend systems and lead technical decisions. Optimize database performance and system reliability.

title: Node.js Backend Developer
description: Build high-performance APIs with Node.js and Express. Implement real-time features using WebSockets.

title: Java Backend Developer
description: Develop enterprise-grade microservices with Spring Boot. Ensure code quality and test coverage.

title: Go Backend Developer
description: Build high-concurrency services in Go. Design efficient data processing pipelines.

title: DevOps Engineer
description: Build and maintain CI/CD pipelines. Automate infrastructure provisioning and application deployments.

title: Senior DevOps Engineer
description: Lead DevOps transformation initiatives. Design platform engineering solutions and establish SRE practices.

title: Junior DevOps Engineer
description: Assist in managing CI/CD pipelines and cloud infrastructure. Learn containerization and automation.

title: Platform Engineer
description: Build internal developer platforms and self-service tools. Improve developer experience and productivity.

title: Release Engineer
description: Manage release processes and deployment strategies. Implement blue-green and canary deployments.

title: Cybersecurity Analyst
description: Monitor security events and respond to incidents. Conduct vulnerability assessments and security audits.

title: Senior Security Engineer
description: Design and implement security architecture. Lead security initiatives and establish security best practices.

title: Junior Security Analyst
description: Assist in monitoring security dashboards and triaging alerts. Learn security tools and incident response procedures.

title: Penetration Tester
description: Conduct penetration tests on web applications and network infrastructure. Write detailed findings reports.

title: Cloud Security Engineer
description: Secure cloud infrastructure and implement compliance controls. Design cloud security architectures.

title: Security Operations Center (SOC) Analyst
description: Monitor SIEM dashboards and investigate security alerts. Escalate and document security incidents.

title: AppSec Engineer
description: Integrate security into the software development lifecycle. Conduct code reviews and implement SAST/DAST tools.

title: Full-Stack Developer
description: Build end-to-end web applications using React and Node.js. Manage databases and deploy to cloud platforms.

title: Senior Full-Stack Engineer
description: Architect and build scalable full-stack applications. Mentor team members and drive technical decisions.

title: Junior Full-Stack Developer
description: Develop features across the full stack. Learn best practices in frontend and backend development.

title: Python Full-Stack Developer
description: Build full-stack applications with Django backend and React frontend. Design RESTful APIs and manage data models.

title: MEAN/MERN Stack Developer
description: Build modern web apps using the MERN stack. Implement real-time features and progressive web app capabilities.

title: Next.js Full-Stack Developer
description: Build server-rendered React applications with Next.js. Implement API routes, authentication, and database integration.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description: Design, train, and deploy ML models in production. Build ML pipelines and optimize model inference.

title: Senior ML Engineer
description: Lead ML infrastructure and model deployment at scale. Architect end-to-end ML systems and mentor the team.

title: Junior ML Engineer
description: Assist in building and testing machine learning models. Learn ML engineering practices and tools.

title: AI Research Engineer
description: Conduct applied AI research and publish findings. Implement state-of-the-art models and evaluate novel techniques.

title: MLOps Engineer
description: Build and maintain ML deployment pipelines. Implement model monitoring, versioning, and A/B testing.
